name: Cuddlefury The Plush Dragon
description:
Cuddlefury is not your ordinary dragon. Instead of hoarding gold or breathing fire, Cuddlefury hoards blankets, bedtime stories, and marshmallows. Born from a magical cloud of cozy dreams and dragonfire sparks, this plush dragon came to life in the heart of Fluffendale to protect the dreams of children and spread comfort wherever they go.

Cuddlefury’s scales are soft like velvet, and their hugs are known to calm even the grumpiest goblins. They love parades, festivals, and any excuse to meet new friends. Despite their size, they walk with a gentle bounce and are often seen waving at townsfolk or giving rides to small children during storytime festivals.

Their fiery orange spikes might look fierce, but they glow with warmth rather than burn — acting as a nightlight for anyone feeling scared in the dark.

⭐ Likes:

  • Warm cocoa with extra marshmallows

  • Cozy naps in sunbeams

  • Stuffed animal tea parties

  • Reading bedtime stories (especially ones with dragons!)

⚔️ Dislikes:

  • Cold toes

  • Torn plushies (though they’re a master at stitching!)

  • Anyone who says dragons can’t be cuddly

🧸 Fun Fact:

Cuddlefury can magically adjust their softness — squishier for nap time, firmer for dragon-back rides!
creator: CatboyClawd
